_doc: Auto airdrop collector — the never-miss radar. Researched June 2026. Each airdrop: status (claimable/snapshot-pending/farming/rumored), known dates, how to qualify, the keyless checker URL + (where known) an onchain Merkle-distributor contract for automated eligibility, cost to qualify (free/gas/capital), and value hint. The engine sorts by URGENCY (claimable + nearest deadline first) and the orchestrator alerts before any window closes. CLAIMING stays the operator's signed action (auto-claim = the #1 wallet-drain vector via fake airdrop sites). Add your existing PUBLIC addresses to config/wallets-watch.json to scan them for unclaimed drops.

airdrops.name: LayerZero
airdrops.qualify: Bridge via LayerZero/Stargate, use OFT apps across chains, consistent cross-chain activity. ~30% of ZRO still to distribute = future seasons likely.

airdrops.name: Base (network token)
airdrops.qualify: Genuine onchain Base history + Base app (post content w/ engagement, hold USDC) + a Basename + Builder Score. The mesh repo's GitHub signal feeds this.

airdrops.name: OpenSea
airdrops.qualify: Trade/list NFTs on OpenSea + use OpenSea Pro/app. Token confirmed, mechanics unannounced.

airdrops.name: Polymarket
airdrops.qualify: Trade on prediction markets (needs capital to bet). Confirmed token + airdrop direction. Double-duty: also the world-pulse sentiment feed.

airdrops.name: Jupiter (Solana)
airdrops.qualify: Swap on Jupiter, use Solana DeFi, hold/stake JUP. Recurring 'Jupuary' rounds.

airdrops.name: Hyperliquid
airdrops.qualify: Trade perps on Hyperliquid (points). S1 was one of the largest airdrops ever; future seasons possible.

airdrops.name: Monad
airdrops.qualify: Use Monad testnet, deploy/interact, community. High-profile L1, testnet = free.

airdrops.name: MegaETH
airdrops.qualify: Testnet activity. Real-time EVM L2, well-funded. Free to farm on testnet.

airdrops.name: EigenLayer (points)
airdrops.qualify: Restake ETH/LSTs → EIGEN points → seasons. Needs capital (restaking).

airdrops.name: Farcaster (points/Warps)
airdrops.qualify: Active Farcaster account (also = Neynar proof-of-humanity that boosts ALL your airdrop sybil-resistance). Cast, build, engage. Near-free.

airdrops.name: Zora (creator coins)
airdrops.qualify: Create content coins (every post = a coin, earn 1%/trade) + hold/trade. Creation play, mostly free.

airdrops.name: Telegram tap-to-earn (Dropee/X-Empire)
airdrops.qualify: ~5 min/day tapping on TON mini-apps. Airdrop-shaped, free. Cap at ~10 min/day.

honest: Most airdrop snapshot dates are TBA — the radar tracks them as they're announced and alerts before any CLAIM window closes (missing a claim = lost money, the real risk). From a FRESH $0 wallet you're eligible for nothing yet — the value is (1) never missing a future one, (2) the exact qualify-steps to build eligibility, (3) scanning your EXISTING public addresses for unclaimed drops. Onchain-activity airdrops need gas to qualify (the $0 blocker); social/testnet/holding ones are free.
